_org_id_note: Adobe doesn't expose org names via API. Hard-code the org_id<->label mapping in babelfish_query_renamer.py (ORG_LABELS).
_usage: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your own values. Keep one config.json per Adobe org. Underscored keys are comments and ignored by the loader.
my_user_ids: <paste your userId once discovered via the picker>
